# Tooling Reference Data

## Purpose

Stores Tier 2 tooling-related reference data: search indices, utility metadata, and tool configuration for source discovery workflows.

## Examples of Sources That Belong Here

- GenshinTextSearch index metadata (freshness-tagged)
- @mihoyo-kit/genshin-api configuration/schema (if needed)
- Search tool configuration and query templates

## Allowed Use

- Source candidate discovery (search hits suggest where to look)
- Multilingual text/voice search
- Tool configuration for agent workflows
- Metadata about available search capabilities

## Disallowed Use

- Evidence by itself
- Canon proof
- source_evidence_id
- Claim mapping
- Status upgrades

## Note

Not canon by itself. Search hits are candidates only — they point to where evidence might be found, not evidence themselves. Tooling data may be stale; always check freshness metadata before relying on results.
